We’re a people-first real estate agency helping buyers, sellers, and investors find homes that truly fit their lives.

Every listing, every client, every happy move — it all starts here. Learn how our small idea turned into a big mission: making real estate simple, honest, and human.

Looking for a home? You’ve probably been here before...

Endless scrolling through outdated listings

Agents who promise too much but deliver too little

Feeling like just another number instead of a person

Feeling like just another number instead of a person

We get it — and that’s exactly why we started this agency. Our mission is to make real estate personal again. We take care of the details, guide you with honesty, and keep the process simple — so you can focus on the joy of finding a place that truly feels like home.

Company Background

A trusted real estate agency helping buyers, sellers, and investors find the right homes across the USA.

“I started this agency because I wanted people to feel something when they found a home — not just relief, but belonging.”

Oliver Vance

Oliver Vance

Oliver Vance

CEO & OWNER, REALESTA

Our agency combines experience, integrity, and modern real estate tools to help you make confident property decisions. We specialize in residential sales, rentals, and investment opportunities across major U.S. cities.

Every client gets personalized attention, verified property options, and honest advice from our dedicated agents. Whether you’re searching for your dream home, planning to sell, or exploring real estate investment, we’re here to guide you with clarity, trust, and proven expertise.

Our History

Our journey through the years

The idea sparked

It all started with a few passionate agents who believed real estate could be simpler, more transparent, and a lot more human. With a few laptops, endless coffee, and a shared dream, the journey began from a small office with big ambitions.

2012

The idea sparked

It all started with a few passionate agents who believed real estate could be simpler, more transparent, and a lot more human. With a few laptops, endless coffee, and a shared dream, the journey began from a small office with big ambitions.

2012

The idea sparked

It all started with a few passionate agents who believed real estate could be simpler, more transparent, and a lot more human. With a few laptops, endless coffee, and a shared dream, the journey began from a small office with big ambitions.

2012

The first breakthrough

After helping our first 100 clients find their perfect homes, word began to spread. People loved our honest advice and easy-going approach — no pressure, no jargon, just genuine help.

2014

The first breakthrough

After helping our first 100 clients find their perfect homes, word began to spread. People loved our honest advice and easy-going approach — no pressure, no jargon, just genuine help.

2014

The first breakthrough

After helping our first 100 clients find their perfect homes, word began to spread. People loved our honest advice and easy-going approach — no pressure, no jargon, just genuine help.

2014

Expanding beyond one city

What started in one neighborhood quickly grew into multiple cities. Our team of three became twelve, covering everything from family homes to luxury condos.

2016

Expanding beyond one city

What started in one neighborhood quickly grew into multiple cities. Our team of three became twelve, covering everything from family homes to luxury condos.

2016

Expanding beyond one city

What started in one neighborhood quickly grew into multiple cities. Our team of three became twelve, covering everything from family homes to luxury condos.

2016

Embracing technology

We introduced digital listings, virtual tours, and smarter search tools to make browsing easier than ever. Clients could explore homes from anywhere — long before it became the norm.

2019

Embracing technology

We introduced digital listings, virtual tours, and smarter search tools to make browsing easier than ever. Clients could explore homes from anywhere — long before it became the norm.

2019

Embracing technology

We introduced digital listings, virtual tours, and smarter search tools to make browsing easier than ever. Clients could explore homes from anywhere — long before it became the norm.

2019

A stronger, smarter agency

We rebranded with a new look, a new website, and a bigger vision — helping buyers, sellers, and investors connect with homes that truly fit their lifestyle.

2019

A stronger, smarter agency

We rebranded with a new look, a new website, and a bigger vision — helping buyers, sellers, and investors connect with homes that truly fit their lifestyle.

2019

2019

Still growing, still grounded

Now with a full team of agents, designers, and support specialists, we continue doing what we love — helping people find where they truly belong. Because for us, every sold sign is more than a transaction; it’s a story worth celebrating.

2019

Our Differences

We’ve built our name on integrity, teamwork, and results that speak for themselves — no gimmicks, no pressure.

Trust

Honest service, no hidden surprises.

Expertise

Local agents who truly know.

Simplicity

Easy steps, clear communication always.

Support

Guidance before, during, and after.

Results

Fast closings, satisfied happy clients.

Built on integrity and trust

We believe in doing what’s right, being transparent, and earning your confidence through every step.

Modern tools for a smarter journey

From virtual tours to data-driven insights, we use technology to make buying or selling simple and efficient.

Experience that makes every move easier

With years of market knowledge and real insights, we guide you toward the best decisions with confidence.

Committed from first call to closing

We stay by your side from start to finish, ensuring every detail is handled with care and professionalism.

Recognition

Here are the awards and accolades that make us proud.

Best Real Estate Agency — Miami Regional Property Awards

Recognized for exceptional client satisfaction, strong local market presence, and outstanding performance across the Miami area.

2024

Best Real Estate Agency — Miami Regional Property Awards

Recognized for exceptional client satisfaction, strong local market presence, and outstanding performance across the Miami area.

2024

Excellence in Property Marketing — National Realtors Recognition

Awarded for creative marketing campaigns, professional listing visuals, and high engagement across digital real estate platforms.

2023

Excellence in Property Marketing — National Realtors Recognition

Awarded for creative marketing campaigns, professional listing visuals, and high engagement across digital real estate platforms.

2023

Top Sales Performance — Florida Real Estate Guild

Honored for achieving record-breaking property sales and maintaining consistent year-over-year growth in transactions.

2022

Top Sales Performance — Florida Real Estate Guild
